root.sql: SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_installment, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_paycode, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_last_date FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id = '000' AND sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance > 0 and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = to_date('31/12/2021' , 'dd/mm/yyyy')
